zh.South Mymms, Middlesex, England: 英國米德萊可素斯 米姆斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry de Frowyk於大約1294年出生在英國米德萊可素斯 米姆斯時，他的父親Renald Frowyk35歲，母親Agnes36歲。他和Margaret Pouns至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1378年在他的家鄉享年85歲，埋葬在英國倫敦。

zh-hans.South Mymms, Middlesex, England: 英国米德萊可素斯 米姆斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry de Frowyk于大约1294年出生在英国米德萊可素斯 米姆斯时，他的父亲Renald Frowyk35岁，母亲Agnes36岁。他和Margaret Pouns至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1378年在他的家乡享年85岁，埋葬在英国倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry de Frowyk was born about 1294, in South Mymms, Middlesex, England, his father, Renald Frowyk, was 35 and his mother, Agnes, was 36. He had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Margaret Pouns. He died in 1378, in his hometown, at the age of 85, and was buried in London, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry de Frowyk est né environ 1294, à South Mymms, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Renald Frowyk, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Agnes, avait 36 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Margaret Pouns. Il est décédé en 1378, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 85 ans, et a été enterré à Londres, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry de Frowyk um 1294 in South Mymms, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Renald Frowyk 35 und seine Mutter Agnes 36. Er hatte mit Margaret Pouns mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1378 im Alter von 85 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in London, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Frowyk è nato il circa 1294 nel South Mymms, Middlesex, England, il suo padre, Renald Frowyk, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Agnes, aveva 36 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Margaret Pouns. Morì nel 1378, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 85 anni, e fu sepolto a London, England.

ja.London, Middlesex, England: イギリスミッドレセックスロンドン
ja.South Mymms, Middlesex, England: イギリスミッドレセックスソウス ムインムズ
ja.Old Fold, Middlesex, England: イギリスミッドレセックス
ja.Middlesex, England: イギリスイギリスミッドレセックス
ja.lifeSummary: Henry de Frowykが約1294年にイギリスミッドレセックスソウス ムインムズで生まれた時，父Renald Frowykは35歳，母Agnesは36歳であった。彼はMargaret Pounsとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1378年に故郷で85歳で死去し，イギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry de Frowyk(이)가 대략 1294년 영국 미들레세스 소우스 마이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Renald Frowyk(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes(은)는 36세였다. 그는 Margaret Pouns(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1378년 그의 고향에서 85세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Frowyk nasceu aproximadamente 1294, em South Mymms, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Renald Frowyk, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Agnes, tinha 36 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Margaret Pouns. Ele faleceu em 1378, em sua cidade natal, com 85 anos, e foi sepultado em London, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry de Frowyk родился около 1294 г. в местности соут миммс, миддлесекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Renald Frowyk было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes, 36. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Margaret Pouns. Он умер в 1378 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 85 лет и был похоронен в местности Лондон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry de Frowyk nació aproximadamente 1294, en South Mymms, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, Renald Frowyk, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Agnes, tenía 36 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Margaret Pouns. Murió en 1378, en su pueblo, a la edad de 85 años, y fue sepultado en London, Inglaterra.
